title: 3 Red-Hot Stocks to Buy for the Long Haul
text: Today's prices are the perfect opportunity to invest in these long-term winners for a steal.

title: Analyst Praises REIT's Potential Amid Economic Turmoil
text: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) received an upgrade from RBC this morning, with the firm raising the real estate investment trust (REIT) to "outperform" from "sector perform," though it also slashed its price target to $79 from $95.

title: 5 Laggards For The Week Ending June 17, 2022
text: U.S. equities were pummeled into a sustained bear market in the week ended June 17, 2022. Tighter monetary conditions, disappointing economic data, and havoc in the cryptocurrency market were a few notable developments during the week.

title: Equity Residential: Protected By The Affluence Of Their Renters
text: Equity Residential is a REIT with interests in high-quality, multi-family properties targeted to an affluent population of renters. With an approximate household income of $166K versus the U.S. average of $92K, EQR's resident base isn't burdened by rent, which enables greater flexibility for rent increases.

title: Equity Residential: 3.6% Yield, 29% Upside, Almost Recovered From COVID
text: Thanks to the nationwide housing shortage, I expected Apartment REITs to outperform in 2022. It hasn't worked out that way so far. Equity Residential has performed slightly better than the average Apartment REIT, and the overall REIT average.

title: Elon Musk Is Right About Real Estate: 7 REITs With Solid and Dependable Dividends
text: The stock market has been hammered this year. While we are likely to continue to see bear market rallies like Wednesday, the reality is that the sell-off will resume and likely continue until rate hikes are concluded.

title: 7 Undervalued REITs to Buy Before They Go Sky-High
text: The stock market is looking shaky, but these undervalued REITs should be fine during the current inflationary economic conditions. The post 7 Undervalued REITs to Buy Before They Go Sky-High appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Equity Residential to Participate in Nareit Investor Conference
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today announced that members of the Company's senior management team, including the Company's President and CEO, Mark J. Parrell, will participate in a roundtable presentation at the Nareit REIT Week 2022 Investor Conference on Tuesday, June 7 at 11:45 a.m. ET. The event will be web cast live. A link to the web cast will be available in the Presentations section of Investor section of the Company's website at www.equityapartments.com Abou
